backgrounds.name: Acolyte
backgrounds.description: You have spent your life in the service of a temple to a specific god or pantheon of gods.
backgrounds.feature_desc: As an acolyte, you command the respect of those who share your faith. You can perform religious ceremonies and receive free healing at temples of your faith.
personality_traits: I idolize a particular hero of my faith.
I see omens in every event.
Nothing can shake my optimistic attitude.
bonds: I would die to recover an ancient relic of my faith.
I owe my life to the priest who took me in.
flaws: I judge others harshly.
I put too much trust in those who wield power.

backgrounds.name: Criminal
backgrounds.description: You are an experienced criminal with a history of breaking the law.
backgrounds.feature_desc: You have a reliable contact in the criminal underworld who can help you find information about criminal organizations.
personality_traits: I always have a plan for when things go wrong.
I am always calm, no matter the situation.
bonds: I'm trying to pay off an old debt.
My ill-gotten gains go to support my family.
flaws: When I see something valuable I can't help but pocket it.
I turn tail and run when things look bad.

backgrounds.name: Folk Hero
backgrounds.description: You come from a humble social rank, but you are destined for so much more.
backgrounds.feature_desc: Since you come from the ranks of the common folk, you fit in among them with ease. You can find a place to hide, rest, or recuperate among commoners.
personality_traits: I judge people by their actions, not their words.
If someone is in trouble, I'm always ready to lend help.
bonds: I have a family, but I have no idea where they are.
I protect those who cannot protect themselves.
flaws: The tyrant who rules my land will stop at nothing to see me killed.
I'm convinced of the significance of my destiny.

backgrounds.name: Noble
backgrounds.description: You understand wealth, power, and privilege.
backgrounds.feature_desc: Thanks to your noble birth, people are inclined to think the best of you. You are welcome in high society and people assume you have the right to be wherever you are.
personality_traits: My eloquent flattery makes everyone I talk to feel like the most wonderful person in the world.
I take great pains to always look my best.
bonds: I will face any challenge to win the approval of my family.
My loyalty to my sovereign is unwavering.
flaws: I secretly believe that everyone is beneath me.
I hide a truly scandalous secret.

backgrounds.name: Sage
backgrounds.description: You spent years learning the lore of the multiverse.
backgrounds.feature_desc: When you attempt to learn or recall a piece of lore, if you do not know that information, you often know where and from whom you can obtain it.
personality_traits: I use polysyllabic words that convey the impression of great erudition.
I've read every book in the world's greatest libraries.
bonds: I have an ancient text that holds terrible secrets.
My life's work is a series of tomes related to a specific field of lore.
flaws: I speak without thinking through the consequences.
I overlook obvious solutions in favor of complicated ones.

backgrounds.name: Soldier
backgrounds.description: War has been your life for as long as you care to remember.
backgrounds.feature_desc: You have a military rank from your career as a soldier. Soldiers loyal to your former military organization still recognize your authority.
personality_traits: I'm always polite and respectful.
I'm haunted by memories of war.
bonds: I would still lay down my life for the people I served with.
Someone saved my life on the battlefield.
flaws: The monstrous enemy we faced in battle still leaves me quivering with fear.
I made a terrible mistake in battle that cost many lives.

backgrounds.name: Outlander
backgrounds.description: You grew up in the wilds, far from civilization and the comforts of town and technology.
backgrounds.feature_desc: You have an excellent memory for maps and geography, and can always recall the general layout of terrain, settlements, and other features around you.
personality_traits: I'm driven by a wanderlust that led me away from home.
I watch over my friends as if they were a litter of newborn pups.
bonds: My family, clan, or tribe is the most important thing in my life.
I will bring terrible wrath down on the evildoers who destroyed my homeland.
flaws: I am too enamored of ale, wine, and other intoxicants.
Violence is my answer to almost any challenge.

backgrounds.name: Entertainer
backgrounds.description: You thrive in front of an audience.
backgrounds.feature_desc: You can always find a place to perform, and you receive free lodging and food of a modest or comfortable standard as long as you perform each night.
personality_traits: I know a story relevant to almost every situation.
Whenever I come to a new place, I collect local rumors.
bonds: My instrument is my most treasured possession.
I want to be famous, whatever it takes.
flaws: I'll do anything to win fame and renown.
I'm a sucker for a pretty face.

backgrounds.name: Guild Artisan
backgrounds.description: You are a member of an artisan's guild, skilled in a particular field and closely associated with other artisans.
backgrounds.feature_desc: As an established member of a guild, you can rely on certain benefits. Fellow guild members will provide you with lodging and food if necessary.
personality_traits: I believe that anything worth doing is worth doing right.
I'm rude to people who lack my commitment to hard work.
bonds: The workshop where I learned my trade is the most important place in the world to me.
I owe my guild a great debt.
flaws: I'll do anything to get my hands on something rare.
I'm quick to assume that someone is trying to cheat me.

backgrounds.name: Hermit
backgrounds.description: You lived in seclusion for a formative part of your life.
backgrounds.feature_desc: The quiet seclusion of your extended hermitage gave you access to a unique and powerful discovery.
personality_traits: I've been isolated for so long that I rarely speak, preferring gestures.
I am utterly serene, even in the face of disaster.
bonds: I entered seclusion because I loved someone I could not have.
My isolation gave me great insight into a great evil.
flaws: Now that I've returned to the world, I enjoy its delights a little too much.
I like keeping secrets and won't share them with anyone.

backgrounds.name: Charlatan
backgrounds.description: You have always had a way with people.
equipment: Set of weighted dice or marked cards
backgrounds.feature_desc: You have created a second identity that includes documentation, established acquaintances, and disguises that allow you to assume that persona.
personality_traits: I fall in and out of love easily.
I have a joke for every occasion.
bonds: I fleeced the wrong person and must work to ensure that they never find me.
I owe everything to my mentor.
flaws: I can't resist a pretty face.
I'm a terrible liar but pretend to be great at it.

backgrounds.name: Sailor
backgrounds.description: You sailed on a seagoing vessel for years.
backgrounds.feature_desc: When you need to, you can secure free passage on a sailing ship for yourself and your adventuring companions. You get passage in exchange for working during the voyage.
personality_traits: My friends know they can rely on me.
I work hard so that I can play hard.
bonds: I'm loyal to my captain first, everything else second.
I'll always remember my first ship.
flaws: I follow orders even if I think they're wrong.
I once made a mistake that resulted in the loss of lives.
